references.text: Malabrigo Jr, PL, AGA Umali, GT Eduarte, JRL Navidad & AB Tobias. 2023. Helicia danlagunzadii (Proteaceae), a new species from the Mt. Mantalingahan Protected Landscape, Palawan, Philippines. Philippine Journal of Science 152: 581-589
Sleumer, H. 1955. Proteaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 5: 147-206

species.citation: R.Br. , Trans. Linn. Soc. London, 1st Ser. 10 (1810) 176 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1 (1955) 155.
A.Cunn. ex R.Br. , Suppl. Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holl. (1830) 24 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1 (1955) 155.
species.notes: Native of Australia. Occasionally cultivated in the Philippines as an ornamental or shade tree.

species.citation: Malabrigo, Eduarte, A.G.Umali, A.B.Tobias & Navidad , PJS 152 (2023) 584; Type: Malabrigo 1605 (LBC, holo; CAHUP, PNH, iso), Palawan: Rizal, Brgy Ransang, Mt Mantalingahan Protected Landscape, 1360m, 25-Jul-2019.
Merr. , PJS 3c (1908) 132 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 99; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1 (1955) 189; Type: Mrs. Clemens s.n., Mindanao: Lake Lanao, Camp Keithley, Apr & Sep-1907.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Lanao del Sur, Misamis Occidental.

species.citation: C.Presl , Abh. Königl. Böhm. Ges. Wiss., 5th Ser. 6 (1851) 607 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 100; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1 (1955) 169.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. CATANDUANES, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Bataan, Cagayan, Laguna, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao, NEGROS (photos), PALAWAN.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 17 (1920) 247 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 100; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1 (1955) 189; Romeroso et al., J. Asia-Pacific Biodiv. 17 (2024) 12; Type: BS 34610 Ramos & Pascasio (US, iso), Mindanao: Surigao del Norte, 300m, 25-Apr-1919.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BUCAS GRANDE (photos), DINAGAT, HOMONHON, LEYTE, LUZON: Aurora, MINDANAO: Davao Oriental, Surigao, Surigao del Norte.
species.notes: Along river banks on iron deposits. 300m.

species.citation: Sleumer , Blumea 8 (1955) 24 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1 (1955) 170. ≠ Helicia loranthoides auct. non C.Presl ; Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 99, pro parte.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Misamis Occidental, Zamboanga del Norte (photos), MINDORO.
species.notes: Forests, probably in the higher regions. Fl. May-Jul; fr. Apr. 855m.

species.citation: (Roxb.) R.Br. ex Blume , Ann. Sci. Nat. (Paris), 2nd Sér. 1 (1834) 220 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1 (1955) 184; ≡ Roupala robusta Roxb. , Fl. Ind. (Carey & Wallich) 1 (1820) 366. var. robusta; Romeroso et al., J. Asia-Pacific Biodiv. 17 (2024) 12. = Helicia cumingiana C.Presl, Abh. Königl. Böhm. Ges. Wiss., 5th Ser. 6 (1851) 606; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 99. = Helicia cumingiana var. parvifolia Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 99. = Helicia oligophlebia Merr., PJS 11c (1916) 6; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 100. Distribution: Bangladesh, Borneo, India, Java, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Sumatra, Thailand. BILIRAN, CATANDUANES, HOMONHON, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Apayao, Bataan, Batangas, Benguet, Camarines Norte, Ilocos Sur, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao, Davao Oriental, Lanao, Misamis Occidental, Surigao, MINDORO, NEGROS, SAMAR. Notes: Primary and secondary rainforests, on steep slopes and hills, not rarely on clayey ground, also on volcanic sands, along creeks or near swamps, scattered but occasionally common. Fl. throughout the year, mainly May-Aug; fr. mainly Jul-Sep(-Nov). 0-1600(-1900)m. Native. var. integrifolia (Elmer) Sleumer, Blumea 8 (1955) 57; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1 (1955) 186; ≡ Helicia integrifolia Elmer, LPB 8 (1915) 2798; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 99. = Helicia integra Merr., PJS 10c (1915) 301; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 99. Distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. DINAGAT, LUZON: Bataan, Benguet, Camarines Norte, Ifugao, Laguna, Mountain Province, Quezon, Rizal, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Davao Oriental, MINDORO. Notes: 800-900m. Native.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Borneo, Cambodia, India, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. BILIRAN, CATANDUANES, DINAGAT, HOMONHON, LEYTE, LUZON: Abra, Albay, Apayao, Aurora (photos), Bataan, Batangas, Benguet, Cagayan (photos), Camarines Norte, Camarines Sur, Ifugao, Ilocos Sur, Isabela (photos), Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Davao, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Lanao, Misamis Occidental, South Cotabato, Surigao, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY (photos), SAMAR.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 19 August 2021

species.citation: (Elmer) Sleumer , Blumea 8 (1955) 83 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1 (1955) 192; ≡ Helicia artocarpoides Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1826 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 99.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. MINDANAO: Zamboanga Sibugay, Zamboanga del Norte (photos), PALAWAN.
species.notes: In rainforest, on well-drained slopes, ridges and steep river banks, apparently scattered. Fl. Feb, Apr-Oct; fr. Oct. 0-900m.
